quote: Q1 2025 total revenue RMB 95,672M (US$13.2B), +10% YoY; GAAP operating profit RMB 16,086M, -38% YoY; non-GAAP operating margin 19% vs 33% prior year
Q2 2025 total revenue RMB 103,985M (US$14.5B), +7% YoY; GAAP operating profit RMB 25,793M, -21% YoY; net income RMB 30,754M, -4% YoY
Q3 2025 total revenue RMB 108,277M (US$15.2B), +9% YoY; GAAP net income RMB 29,328M, +17% YoY; EPS US$2.96 vs estimate US$2.21; R&D expenses +41% YoY
Market cap ~US$144-146B; trailing P/E 10.5x; forward P/E 8.4-9.6x; EV/EBITDA 6.63x; net cash position ~$58B ($40.87/share); ROE 30.5%
5-year average P/E 19.71; 10-year median P/E 19.03; current P/E of ~10.5 is 44% below 10-year median
FY 2024 revenue RMB 393,836.1M ($53,955.3M), +59% YoY; FY 2024 net income RMB 112.4B ($15.4B), +87.3% YoY
PDD Holdings to report Q4 and FY2025 results on March 25, 2026; Q4 2025 EPS estimate US$3.04

Co-CEO Zhao Jiazhen: 'Revenue growth continued to be under pressure and operating profit grew in low single digits... intensified competition within the e-commerce sector centered around new business models'
RMB 100 billion (~$13.7B) merchant support program over three years; RMB 10 billion fee reduction; non-GAAP operating margin dropped from 33% to 19%
Temu lost 58% of daily US visitors after the de minimis exemption ended; US daily users fell ~48% vs March 2025
Temu cut US ad impressions by 97%; app open rate fell from 82% to 64%; plummeted to #73 in US App Store
Morgan Stanley: temu.com traffic dropped 81%, visitors dropped 78% from March to May; US app downloads declined 85% YoY; only 18% of US consumers shopped on Temu in past 3 months — record low
Temu's share of US Google Shopping ad impressions went from 20% (April 5) to 0% (April 12); paid search traffic dropped 77%
US install base recovered to 91 million by October 2025, after dropping to 68 million in June 2025; iOS + Android downloads up 75% in July vs prior month
Global MAU (August 2025): 530 million (record high); US MAU: 133.6 million (down 28% YoY); EU MAU: 141.6 million (up 74% YoY, 34% of global user base)
Temu remained #1 in global shopping app downloads for third consecutive year (2023-2025), with 363 million downloads in 2025; cumulative downloads exceeded 1.2 billion by October 2025
De minimis exemption eliminated for China/HK effective May 2, 2025; global suspension of de minimis for all countries effective August 29, 2025
One Big Beautiful Bill Act passed July 4, 2025: permanently repeals Section 321 effective July 1, 2027; civil penalties up to $10,000 for order-splitting
Import charges of ~145% added to products: $18.47 dress became $44.68 total; $12.44 bathing suit became $31.12 total

July 29, 2025: European Commission preliminarily found Temu in breach of DSA; potential fine up to 6% of global annual turnover; mystery shopping found consumers 'very likely to find non-compliant products'
December 10, 2025: European Commission raided Temu's European HQ in Dublin as part of Foreign Subsidies Regulation probe; second FSR dawn raid ever
FSR potential penalty: up to 10% of annual aggregated turnover, plus possible structural remedies; Court confirmed Commission can request data stored on servers outside EU, including in China
EU agreed to impose fixed EUR 3 customs duty on parcels under EUR 150 entering EU, effective July 1, 2026; in 2024, ~4.6 billion low-value shipments entered EU, China = ~91%
New platform pricing rules jointly issued by NDRC, SAMR, and CAC: ban platforms from imposing 'lowest price' agreements on merchants; effective April 10, 2026

SAMR 2026 priorities: intensified antitrust enforcement, curbing 'cutthroat competition'; draft antitrust compliance guidelines for internet platforms address algorithmic collusion, below-cost sales, forced exclusivity
Revised AUCL enacted June 27, 2025, effective October 15, 2025: extraterritorial reach; fines up to RMB 5 million with personal liability for key individuals
August 2025 MAU: Pinduoduo app recorded 540.57 million monthly active users in China (iiMedia Research)
Pinduoduo reached approximately $817 billion in GMV in 2025, ranking second globally behind Amazon ($845B)
PDD Holdings holds roughly 23% of China e-commerce market vs Alibaba's 32%; Douyin expected to become #1 in global online apparel by 2026
Douyin Aug 2024-Jul 2025 GMV increased 34% YoY; shelf e-commerce contribution reached ~50% during 618 festival; full-year 2025 expected to surpass RMB 4T
Douyin 2024 GMV: ~RMB 3.5 trillion, up 30% YoY; saved merchants >RMB 32B in costs in 2025; strategy shifted from subsidizing consumers to subsidizing merchants
JD.com FY2025: revenue RMB 1,309.1B (+13%), net income RMB 19.6B; declared $1.0/ADS dividend (~$1.4B); repurchased ~$3.0B shares in 2025; 700M+ annual active customers
JD New Businesses (food delivery): revenue +199% YoY; daily orders >25M; 1.5M+ merchants; 150K+ riders; operating loss RMB 14.8B (margin -106.7%)
Alibaba Q2 FY2026 revenue RMB 247.8B (+5% YoY); Cloud +34%; AIDC turned profitable for first time: adjusted EBITA profit RMB 162M vs loss of RMB 2.9B prior year
Alibaba announced RMB 380B ($53B) investment over 3 years in cloud + AI infrastructure — exceeds total AI/cloud spend of the past decade
Shein 2024 revenue ~$38B (+18% YoY); net profit ~$1.0-1.1B (-40% YoY); Q1 2025 revenue ~$9.9B; targeting $2B net income for 2025
Shein IPO valuation reportedly cut to ~$30B from peak $100B; weighing moving parent entity back to mainland China to clear CSRC review; FCA approved London listing
Temu reached 24% share of cross-border e-commerce (IPC data of 30,900+ shoppers), matching Amazon; Temu grew from <1% in 2022
Amazon total GMV surpassed $830 billion in 2025; 3P seller share 69% of total GMV; active sellers dropped from 2.4M (2021) to 1.65M
TikTok Shop global GMV: $64.3B (+94% YoY); US GMV: $15.1B (+68% YoY); Southeast Asia: $45.6B (doubled YoY)
Temu operates 13 self-owned warehouses globally: 10 in Europe, 2 in US, 1 near US-Mexico border; California hub in Rowland Heights
Semi-managed orders now represent 80% of US sales; US site traffic dropped 33% and daily GMV fell 50% after de minimis end
China to US West Coast rate $2,127/FEU; over 9 million TEU of new container ships to be delivered in 2026; Xeneta expects spot rates to fall up to 25% in 2026
Temu targets 80% of European orders fulfilled locally from EU warehouses by 2026; bulk shipping to UK 3PL warehouses reduced per-item logistics costs 40-60% vs air freight
Temu expected to reach operational profitability by 2026 with projected operating income of $775M; EU GMV projected to exceed $15B in 2025
BEUC testing: 26 of 27 children's products from Temu non-compliant; 8 classified as high severity; almost two-thirds of all tested products non-compliant
Temu Trustpilot rating: 2.2 out of 5 stars (Poor) from ~48,709 reviews
Rate of likely AI-generated reviews on Temu's Trustpilot increased 1,361% from 2022 to 2025 (0.75% to 10.90%)
Temu invested ~$100M globally in compliance in 2025; plans to double to ~$200M in 2026; partnered with DEKRA for independent product testing
Pinduoduo instant retail investment exceeding RMB 10B primarily for front-end warehouses (Sep 2025-Sep 2026); targeting 20% market share in 2-3 years

Co-Chairman Zhao Jiazhen announced plan to 'recreate a Pinduoduo' in next 3 years through heavy supply chain investment; AI-driven sorting robotics deployed in 2025; 'Billion Supermarket' initiative testing began Jan 2026
Pinduoduo is China's largest D2C agriculture platform, connecting 16M+ farmers to 850M+ customers; trained 100,000 'new farmers' through Duo Duo University
Full year 2025 China consumer prices flat (0.0%); core inflation rose just 0.7%; missed 'around 2%' CPI target
Beijing set 2026 GDP growth target at 4.5-5%; Jan-Feb 2026 retail sales +2.8% YoY; online retail sales jumped 8.6% YoY to RMB 15.97T in 2025
China e-commerce market: $1.53 trillion (2025), forecast $2.52T by 2030 (CAGR 10.42%); user penetration 86.3%
PDD management: 'This is not the right time for share repurchases or dividends, and such actions are not anticipated in the foreseeable future'
PDD attractively valued at forward P/E of 9.4X, offers double-digit earnings yield; improving Chinese economic growth prospects cited as 2026 catalyst
Analyst consensus: Buy rating; average price target US$131.73-$149.43; 0% sell ratings; high target $165-$231
H1 2025: Temu GMV ~$35B (+50% YoY) vs Shein GMV ~$27B (+15-20% YoY); Temu full-year GMV target $100B
Shein added 15.2M new European monthly users (Feb-Jul 2025), reaching 145.7M; outpacing Temu by 30M users in absolute terms
January 2026: Pinduoduo fined RMB 100,000 for failing to report tax-related merchant information; Temu offices raided in Dublin (Dec 2025) and Turkey (Jan 2026)
Temu shifted 20-30% of US advertising budget to Europe; expanding into FMCG category; established German division; EU GMV projected $20B+ by end of 2026
Amazon Haul: only 16% of US consumers shop monthly vs 28% Temu, 23% Shein; 76% of Americans never tried it
De minimis parcels to US fell 54% since exemption abolished (Universal Postal Union); combined daily volume estimated down 30-35%
Temu annual sales: ~$92.5 billion in 2025 (+70-75% YoY); GMV grew from $14B (2023) to $70.8B (2024)
